text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The holidays are right around the corner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower always does her best to help me
out, so I want to find a great present to show her
my appreciation.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So... why did you come to me?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm just a student. An adult like you should be
able to come up with much better ideas than I
ever could.
choice_data_list: But you know Flower so well.
But you know Flower so well.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...I wonder about that. Besides, you're always with
her, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I really doubt I'll think of something better than
you can.
choice_data_list: We both care about her a lot, right?
We both care about her a lot, right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Over the past three years, it's become very clear
that Seiun Sky is always looking out for Nishino
Flower.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If the two of us put our heads together, I know we
can think of something that will bring Nishino
Flower more joy than anything we come up with
separately.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...You're really serious about this, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Peas in a pod, I swear... Which means, she'll probably
also...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nothing.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Argh, geez! Help me with my homework for a
week, and you've got yourself a deal.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, homework. Study. Should be a piece of cake
for an adult like you, no?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's your ticket to accessing my abundant
wisdom. Heck of a bargain, if I do say so myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Seiun Sky and I start brainstorming ideas
on how to make Nishino Flower's holiday
festivities unforgettable.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The big day is here. I invite Nishino Flower over
and welcome her as she arrives.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wow!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Did you decorate the room all by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes! They're very cute. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first surprise is the decorations, and it looks
like they're a resounding success. Next up is the
most important part.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hm? Something smells yummy...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ah! Don't tell me you cooked, too!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
A huge roast chicken, salad, soup... You've even
prepared grilled fish and boiled veggies!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The second surprise, and the event's main
highlight, is a festive holiday spread. I even
whipped up some of Nishino Flower's favorite
Japanese dishes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might not measure up to her cooking, but I
wanted to bring her joy in the same way she
always does for me.
choice_data_list: Thank you for everything you do, Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm the one who should be thanking you! You
always go above and beyond for me!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: And that's why today...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I've got a surprise ready for you, too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower gives me a pair of wool gloves
with an embroidered flower pattern on them.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
There are still plenty of chilly days ahead, so I
thought I'd make you something to keep you
warm while we train outdoors.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Mm-hmm! My mom taught me a few techniques.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I worked on them in secret so I could surprise
you... But the surprise you had in store for me was
on a different scale.
choice_data_list: I didn't expect this at all. Thank you!
I didn't expect this at all. Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! I'm glad you like them. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: It's a good thing that I asked Sky for advice.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I told her I wanted to treat you to a big feast, but
she suggested I try something else this time.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, that was a close one—there would have
been way too much food!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Nishino Flower also went to Seiun Sky for
advice. She must have made various suggestions
to avoid overlap in our presents.
choice_data_list: We'll have to thank Seiun Sky, too.
We'll have to thank Seiun Sky, too.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yeah, for sure!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh! How about we think up a way to surprise her?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
We'll have to come up with something that'll
make her so happy she can't help but smile!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Then let's trade thoughts while we dig into the
yummy food you made! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... Sky loves cats. Oh! And she also takes
a lot of naps during the day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Nishino Flower and I enjoy a wonderful
evening together as we plan a surprise for Seiun
Sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Nishino Flower also went to Seiun Sky for
advice. She must have made various suggestions
to avoid overlap in our presents.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ah! The food is getting cold! Let's talk while we
eat. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: It all looks so yummy! Let's dig in!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That was truly delicious. Thank you so
much!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! Everything was so good. I felt like I could
keep eating forever!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Did you spend a lot of time practicing the dishes?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I believe that a person's true feelings come
through in their cooking.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Your cooking had gentle flavors. I could sense
that you wanted me to relish the meal and feel
joy.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Which tells me that you—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? I am?
choice_data_list: I based the recipes off your cooking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the hope of making something she'd enjoy, I
thought back on the bento boxes she's made me,
and that's when I realized just how much care she
put into them.
choice_data_list: Thank you for always being so considerate.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...I want to say thank you, as well.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm so grateful for the attention you've put into
training me and helping me grow!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ah! And I almost forgot to say the most important
thing!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Happy Holidays, Trainer! ♪
